name: Nidus
description: Nidus draws strength from the Infestation. It bolsters him with survivability as he deals high damage and provides crowd control. Plague your enemies.
passiveDescription: If Nidus is killed with at least |STACKS| stacks of Mutation, those |STACKS| stacks are consumed; this grants |DURATION|s of invulnerability and restores Health to |HEAL|%.

abilities.name: Virulence
abilities.description: Rupture the ground with a damaging fungal growth that steals energy from each enemy it strikes. For every five enemies hit, the Infestation mutates, multiplying its destructive force.

abilities.name: Larva
abilities.description: Spawn an Infested pod that erupts with tendrils, latches onto nearby enemies and pulls them in. Enemies killed while held have a chance of generating a Mutation stack.

abilities.name: Parasitic Link
abilities.description: Bind to a target with parasitic link. When cast on an ally, both the host and Nidus have their Ability Strength increased. Linked enemies take some of the damage inflicted on Nidus.

abilities.name: Ravenous
abilities.description: Gluttonous maggots swarm nearby enemies, feasting until they are hit with Virulence and burst with Infestation. The maggots benefit from Mutation and each enemy hit adds to the Mutation stack.
